title: Shefa 100 White Plates, Reusable & Washable, Heavy Duty Dinnerware, Microwave-Safe Crockery - Ideal for Birthday, Parties, Camping, Catering (9 inch Plates, White)
features: Heavy Duty Dinnerware: Serve the food without running out of dish when you have our pack of 100 reusable plates! It's made of food-grade reusable material that's also durable for hours of use.
Microwave-Safe Pieces: It's sturdy and thick enough to be microwave-resistant when needed.
Our reusable plates are also strong and safe enough to be used for hot and cold edibles.
Easy to Handle: You can rely on its strength and quality not to bend or break when in use. It's especially more convenient to hold compared to lower quality reusables..

Versatile Serving Dishes: These Shefa plates come in white colour that will blend in with any occasion. Click 'Add to Basket' now and let it come in handy for your next party, catering, camping, buffet, and even for daily use.
